Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Input Model Type Python dictionary representing DECLARE constraints Structure Keys are constraint types Values are nested dictionaries mapping source activities to target activities for binary or just activities to metadata for unary Metadata support and confidence are fixed at 1.0 Existing Activities StartApplication FinalDecision RequestAdditionalInfo Existing Constraints existence StartApplication FinalDecision init StartApplication coexistence StartApplication FinalDecision response StartApplication RequestAdditionalInfo succession RequestAdditionalInfo FinalDecision

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Identify Bias Risks Scenario A loan officer or algorithm sees sensitive data Race Gender and immediately makes a decision Reject without a neutral check Missing Activities The current model is too abstract To model bias mitigation need to introduce specific activities CheckSensitiveAttributes CheckApplicantRace CheckApplicantGender BiasMitigationCheck ManualReview Specific Decision outcomes Approve Reject

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Drafting the Constraints Constraint 1 Mandatory Mitigation Check Type response or succession Source CheckApplicantRace Target BiasMitigationCheck Constraint 2 Decision Guard Type nonchainsuccession Source CheckApplicantRace Target Reject Constraint 3 Coexistence of Manual Review Type coexistence Source Reject Target ManualReview Constraint 4 Existence of Bias Check Type existence Activity BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Refining the Constraint Logic based on DECLARE Semantics succession A B If A occurs B must occur after A not necessarily immediately chain succession A B immediately after non chain succession A B B cannot occur immediately after A coexistence A B A occurs if and only if B occurs Correction on Prompt Interpretation add new constraints keep original intact Activities add necessary activities CheckApplicantRace BiasMitigationCheck ManualReview

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Addressing Specific Prompt Requirements Ensure sequence does not discriminate Add constraints any decision activities cannot immediately follow events where sensitive attribute leads to biased outcome nonchainsuccession Require additional checks ManualReview must coexist with decision steps coexistence or response

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Self Correction on coexistence original StartApplication FinalDecision add Reject ManualReview Decision on activities introduce Approve Reject CheckApplicantRace alongside FinalDecision or treat FinalDecision as umbrella but prompt examples require specific Refine Sensitive Attribute representation add CheckApplicantRace Reject

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Finalizing the Model Structure Keep original constraints Add existence BiasMitigationCheck response CheckApplicantRace BiasMitigationCheck nonchainsuccession CheckApplicantRace Reject coexistence Reject ManualReview succession ManualReview FinalDecision Formatting Ensure support confidence present for every entry Rationale prevents hasty decisions mandates human oversight Final Code Assembly Copy original Update existence response nonchainsuccession coexistence
